Yo, \n[1]! I've been here ever since they announced the free attendance period~

The other day, I saw your wife come in here! She just doesn't fit in a place like this, 
you know~?
If you get a job here, you can read manga all day every day~
I just saw the staff drinking one of the free drinks just now without a care.
I'm so jealous of couples that come to places like these~
All the volumes except volume 5 of the book I want to read are here... what a pain...

And so, as I wandered around, I ended up at the manga cafe, and I killed time there.
Thinking about it with a cooler head, I realized that I'd been acting pretty childish too.
Though what he did was nothing commendable either, I'm sure I was
only able to say all that I did because I don't understand the loneliness
he must be feeling after all this time.
He's human too, so it's only natural that he'd have needs and hobbies too.
I should go home, and... apologize. Just say 'sorry'.
D
